title: Jennifer Lawrence Declares This Bold Hue the Color of the Summer
summary: Whether she’s pairing it with a bold, analogous color or a subtler, complementary hue, Jennifer Lawrence is all in on orange this summer.
imageAlt: Jennifer Lawrence Declares This Bold Hue the Color of the Summer
aiSummary: Whether she’s pairing it with a bold, analogous color or a subtler, complementary hue, Jennifer Lawrence is all in on orange this summer.
keyPoints: Jennifer Lawrence Declares This Bold Hue the Color of the Summer
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de estilo.

multimedia.alt: Jennifer Lawrence Declares This Bold Hue the Color of the Summer

fullArticle:
Put your pastels away because Jennifer Lawrence is doubling down on an in-your-face summer color.

Earlier this week, the actor brightened up her black and gray gym clothes with a vibrant, tomato red Roucha Janssen jacket. But Lawrence, a devotee of the “pop of red” styling trick, didn’t stop there: she styled her sporty jacket with a tangerine croc-embossed purse.

The bold choice is backed up by color theory: red and orange are analogous on the color wheel, their shared warm undertones giving Lawrence’s look a harmonious flow. Yesterday, Lawrence offered a more subtle take on the look-at-me color scheme. With a white graphic tee and long white shorts as her base, J.Law added her boxy orange croc bag and a pair of dainty, cherry red T-strap sandals from Tove.
